individual_reviews.title: This college is good, and the infrastructure is very good if you compare near college.

The highest package is 9 LPA, the average is 6 LPA-7 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA-4 LPA. 90 percent of students got internships from my course and in companies like HCL, TCS, etc. The top roles offered are software developer.

individual_reviews.title: Amity University, Greater Noida, is a great choice. A decision you won't regret.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, wonderful infrastructure and helpful faculty members.

content.Placements: Batch 2023, B.Com (Hons). 60 to 70 percent students got placed. The highest package is 30 LPA. The average is 7 LPA. The lowest is 5 LPA. Top recruiters were Deloitte, EY, TCS, Infosys, Accenture, HCL, IBM, Wipro, Google, Goldman Sachs, Cognizant, SAP Labs, Cisco, VMware, ZS Associate and Reliance. Mess food is average with a mix of vegetarian and non-vegetarian options, while the canteen offers more variety. Medical facilities include a health center with doctors on call. Sports infrastructure is good, with indoor and outdoor facilities for cricket, football, basketball, badminton, and gymnasium access.

faqs.question: What is the selection process at AUGN?

paragraphs: Amity University Greater Noida admissionis a multi-step process. The candidates must begin the process by fulfilling the eligibility and apply by filling the application form on official website of college. The admission criteria for all courses, except MBA, are merit-based. For MBA admission, Amity University accepts various national-level entrance exam scores, such as CAT, MAT, GMAT, CMAT, XAT and NMAT. Students who have not given any of these entrance exams can appear for Amity Written Test on the day of interview.
Interested candidates can check below the admission process at Amity University, Greater Noida:
Application Process

TheAmity University Greater Noida application process is conducted onlineon the official website of the University. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria must visit the official website to apply for their desired course. Applicants must submit the application fee and complete the process before the due date.
Shortlisting of Candidates

Candidates are shortlisted based on their merit in the qualifying exam. For MBA, the admission criteria is entrance-based and the candidates are shortlisted based on their performance inMAT/XAT/CAT/NMAT/CMAT/GMAT/ Amity Written Test + Interview (English Language Test + Management Aptitude Test applicable + Extempore + PI).
Admission Confirmation

Shortlisted candidates will be notified about their selection. To confirm their acceptance, candidates are required topay the admission confirmation feeandappear for the document verification processto complete the admission process.

admission_overview.college_name: DES Pune University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: DES Pune University admissionsare based on scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. DES Pune University admissions begin with an online application process. Candidates can either qualify for the university entrance exam or other exams such asJEE Main, MHT CET, CAT, XAT, etc., to proceed with other selection rounds conducted atDES Pune University. To get admitted to DES Pune University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme. The application process atDES Pune Universityis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutDES Pune Universitycourse admission2025.

DES Pune University course admissionis a mix of entrance or merit-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularDES Pune University courses:
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (40% aggregate in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) withPhysics, Mathematics and Chemistry
Graduation with a 50% aggregate
CAT/MAT/XAT/SNAP/NMAT/ GMAT/ PERA/CMAT/MAH-CET/ATMA/MAT/ DES PU Entrance Exam

DES Pune University admissions are entirely based on scores of several entrance exams. The steps of admission comprise multiple rounds. Check below the detailed steps for DES Pune University admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

DES Pune University application process is conducted in an online mode. To apply for UG and PG courses at the university, candidates must visit the official website (https://despu.edu.in) and apply for their desired programme. They must also pay an application fee of INR 1,080.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

DES Pune University admission is entrance-based for all of its UG and PG courses. Candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility requirements of the programme they are applying for. Moreover, the university conducts its in-house entrance exam to grant admission to all courses. However, various state/ national-level entrance exams are also accepted for courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc. After getting shortlisted based on the entrance exam scores, candidates must pay the course fee.
Step 4: Final Admission

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theDES Pune University feeto confirm their seats at the university.
